title: Sudden Sparks
description: This mod summons fire randomly in a 200-block radius of the player.
body:
Watch your world **burn** with this mod!

This mod summons fire within a 200 block radius of any player.

4 Fires have a 1 in 200 chance of spawning on the surface every tick for every player.

**If you showcase this mod, please credit me in the video by adding a link to the mod or a shoutout! It helps :)**

**If you liked this mod, consider supporting my goal on on Ko-fi 😄**

**If you play Roblox, consider testing my friend’s Roblox game by joining: https://www.roblox.com/games/5465638320**
